case_title: HURUY TEKLEZGHI VS. MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HURUY TEKLEZGHI IS NOT PRESENT AT THE TIME OF THE CALLING OF THE CASE AND THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. AT 4:10 P.M. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT ASKING ABOUT HIS CASE. HE IS INFORMED THAT HIS CASE WAS DISMISSED FOR NO APPEARANCE. PLIANTIFF STATES HE WAS PRESENT AT 3:30 P.M. BUT WAS OUT IN THE HALLWAY. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-19 AT 3:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SC-100 FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT - FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEKLEZGHI, HURUY SERVED JUN-20-2019, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-07-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HURUY TEKLEZGHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS. LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. SERVICE MUST BE DONE AGAIN CORRECTLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HURUY TEKLEZGHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE: SIGNED BY THE US COURT OF APPEALS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-25-19 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEKLEZGHI, HURUY AS TO DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TEKLEZGHI, HURUY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2019 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO DEC-05-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES WITH WORKING PHONE NUMBERS ON FILE WERE ADVISE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HURUY TEKLEZGHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEKLEZGHI, HURUY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC. $332.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $377.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $332.50 FILED BY TEKLEZGHI, HURUY AS TO DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMPED RECEIVED - SERVED JUL-22-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MINDFUL PARTNERS, LLC.
